lastChunkSummary: Matched and accepted game-region func_150C3160 after skipping two plateaued candidates. The key was recognizing the manual Gfx word stores as `gDPSetTileSize(arg0++, 4, temp_v1, temp_a0, 0x1FE, 0x03E)`, which preserves the target postincrement scheduling and return pointer update.
